What we offer

Our Services

We provide in-home support only — bringing care, comfort, and companionship directly to your loved one's door.

Respite Services

Giving family carers a well-earned break while ensuring your loved one is in safe, caring hands.

Social Companionship

Meaningful conversation, shared activities, and genuine connection to reduce loneliness and brighten each day.

Home Help

Light household tasks to keep the home tidy, comfortable, and safe — so your loved one can focus on what they enjoy.

Meal Preparation

Home-cooked, nourishing meals prepared with care — because good food is one of life's greatest comforts.

Shelley
Dorothee
Who we are

Meet Shelley & Dorothee

We're two friends with a shared passion for caring for people. Together, we created Trusted Home Companions because we believe that everyone deserves to feel safe, valued, and cared for in the comfort of their own home.

If you're caring for a loved one and could use some extra support, we'd love to have a chat and see if we're the right fit for your family.

Reliable

You can count on us to show up — consistently and on time, every visit.

Compassionate

We genuinely care about the people we support. Every person is treated with warmth and dignity.

Trustworthy

Welcoming someone into your home takes trust. We take that responsibility seriously.

Why choose us

Care that puts people first

01

In-home only

We come to you. No travel, no unfamiliar environments — just care delivered in the comfort of home.

02

Personal & flexible

No cookie-cutter packages. We listen to your needs and tailor our support accordingly.

03

Friendly & local

We're based right here in Perth. Real people, real care — not a faceless agency.

"

We help seniors and others who need care feel safe and comfortable at home — because home is where the heart is.

Shelley & Dorothee · Trusted Home Companions
